nasb.text: He who gives attention to the word will find good, And blessed is he who trusts in the Lord.

esv.text: Whoever gives thought to the word  will discover good, and blessed is he who trusts in the Lord.

cnv.text: 留心聽訓言的必定得益； 倚靠耶和華的是有福的人。

ccb.text: 听从训言的人受益匪浅， 信靠耶和华的人蒙祝福。

csbs.text: 明察事理的，必找到福份； 依靠耶和华的，就必蒙福！
